subject: WM-0009 ready for review
body: Fixed JSON5 source-location lookup to be comment-aware. Bare-key diagnostics now skip // and /* */ comment regions, so missing_def_reference and missing_localization_key stay anchored to the real patch fields rather than comment lines. Added a regression test covering comments that mention labelKey/references before the actual JSON5 fields, and re-ran content tests, content validation, core-smoke compile, typecheck, lint, format, boundaries, and diff checks.
